THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $1,800,753.00; PLAINTIFF SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. SHALL RECOVER INTEREST ACCRUED ON SAID PRINCIPAL AMOUNT FROM JANUARY 1, 2005 TO SEPTEMBER 30, 2009 TOTALING $270,113.00 AS SET FORTH IN REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE SECTION 41113; PLAINTIFF SPRINT COMMUNICATIONS COMPANY L.P. SHALL ALSO RECOVER SUCH INTEREST AS MAY HAVE ACCRUED ON SAID PRINCIPAL AMOUNT AFTER SEPTEMBER 30, 2009 AS SET FORTH IN REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE SECTION 41113. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
